title: DSDS Last Updated Metadata
description: The date this entity's documentation was last updated, with an optional note describing what changed.

value.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent update to this entity's documentation.

description.description: Optional plain-text note summarizing what changed in the most recent update (e.g., 'Added focus-visible guidance', 'Revised contrast requirements for inverse surfaces'). MUST NOT contain markup.
